description: You are a software architect refactoring an e-commerce system diagram at '~/Diagrams/order_system.drawio' to resolve a 'God Class' anti-pattern. Based on the requirements in '~/Desktop/refactoring_review.txt', apply the Strategy Pattern for payment (PaymentStrategy interface; CreditCardPayment, PayPalPayment, BankTransferPayment classes), the Observer Pattern for notifications (OrderObserver interface; EmailNotifier, InventoryUpdater, AuditLogger classes), and the Factory Method Pattern for shipping (ShippingProvider interface, ShippingProviderFactory abstract class, and FedEx/DHL providers). Ensure all new elements use proper UML stereotypes and relationships, and that extracted logic is removed or delegated from the original OrderProcessor class. Export the refactored diagram as a PNG to '~/Diagrams/exports/order_system_refactored.png'.
